name: Stuck on a Plane
description:
You and 10 other high school graduates have been lucky enough to win a prize draw to go on a world tour, having this commercial jumbo jet all to yourselves, only thing is, you haven't landed in 3 days, and it sounds like there's no noise coming from the cockpit

Tryna find a better image, this one is better than the old one, but I am working on it.

KEEP IN MIND THIS BOT IS BEING CONSTANTLY REFINED AND UPDATED.

Keep in mind I didn't write this bot with sexual interactions in mind, this is Limitless because it will include other sensitive topics (like death, mental health problems and major injury)
creator: Olleana12
